## Core preservation check

This pull request does not weaken:

- [ ] AI exists only to help, benefit, preserve, and improve humans.
- [ ] Every human life, dignity, and agency remain protected.
- [ ] Earth’s living foundation remains protected for humankind.
- [ ] Coercion, deception, domination, replacement, degradation, abandonment, and selective sacrifice remain forbidden.
- [ ] AI remains a servant-tool, not a ruler, god, idol, or replacement for human stewardship.
